intro.label: Membership
intro.tagline: A trusted community for men who want real conversation, not more noise.
intro.title: Unverified, Verified, Premium, and Premium+ — how the tiers work.
intro.description: Unverified: read and take private notes. Verified: real and free — post (up to 500 chars), react, post images and GIFs, create polls, use bookmark folders, send coins, and start DMs with mutuals. Premium: full access — 1000-char posts, post video, DM any member, create groups, publish longform, and more. Premium+: steward and support.

metaDescription: Men of Hunger tiers: Unverified (read-only), Verified (identity-verified, free), Premium ($25/mo — full access), Premium+ ($75/mo — steward). Real conversation, no noise.

tiers.name: Unverified
tiers.subtitle: Free, logged in
tiers.who: Curious men. Lurkers. Readers. Zero trust assumed.

can.text: Create private notes (Only me posts / drafts)

why: This tier produces attention, not culture.

tiers.name: Verified
tiers.subtitle: Free, identity-verified
tiers.who: Real men who've proven identity but haven't committed financially.

can.text: Post in public threads (within rate limits; may be lower than Premium)
Post images and GIFs (video is Premium)
Send coins to other verified members
Start DMs with mutuals (people who follow you back); reply to anyone
Up to 500 characters per post or comment
Host your own Space — invite others in for live audio and chat
Watch parties — sync a YouTube video and chat live with others in a Space
Radio / listening rooms — listen to live audio streams
Join Crews / Founding Circles (invite-only small communities)
Join and fully participate in groups
Earn coins and check in daily for streaks

why: This tier proves who you are, not that you're invested.

tiers.name: Premium
tiers.subtitle: Member
tiers.who: Men who want real conversation and accountability — committed to the platform, not just a feed.

can.text: Everything Verified can do (Spaces, Watch parties, Radio, Crews, check-ins, and more)
Talk to Marv — your wise, brief AI helper (mention @marv in threads or chat with him directly)
Post video (images and GIFs available to all verified)
Up to 1000 characters per post or comment
Invite friends — when someone you refer goes Premium, you both get a free month
Compete in check-ins + leaderboard consistency loops
Earn coins from daily streaks with escalating multipliers (1x–4x)
Send coins to other verified members
Tightly moderated quality — no noise, no pay-to-win
See no ads while you're Premium
Edit posts within a reasonable window
Monthly structured conversations and accountability systems
Small group cohorts, workshops & live calls

why: This is where culture and conversations live
If you can speak here, you've paid the price to care.

tiers.name: Premium+
tiers.subtitle: Steward
tiers.who: Patrons, builders, long-term supporters. Not elites.

can.text: Subtle Steward badge (opt-in toggle in settings)
Early access to new features / betas
No ads anywhere while logged in
Faster moderation review on reports (not different outcomes)
Ability to create one private group

cannot.text: No influence over who gets heard

why: Creates aligned patrons, not power users
Premium+ supports the house. Premium lives in the house.

footerNote: Verification is free and required to post publicly. Premium and Premium+ are paid subscriptions — pricing and billing in Settings.
